item.title: Grain Tank Auger Repair on the Farm
item.description: A closer look at repairing a grain tank auger during harvest. Step-by-step troubleshooting, fixing mechanical issues, and restoring smooth grain handling operations.

media:content.media:title: Grain Tank Auger Repair on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A closer look at repairing a grain tank auger during harvest. Step-by-step troubleshooting, fixing mechanical issues, and restoring smooth grain handling operations.

item.title: Getting Equipment Stuck on the Farm
item.description: A look at multiple farm situations where equipment gets stuck during field work. Recovery efforts, ground conditions, and lessons from tough operating conditions.

media:content.media:title: Getting Equipment Stuck on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at multiple farm situations where equipment gets stuck during field work. Recovery efforts, ground conditions, and lessons from tough operating conditions.

item.title: Emergency Shutdown on the Farm
item.description: A sudden equipment issue leads to an immediate shutdown during farm work. A quick look at troubleshooting, safety response, and protecting machinery from damage.

media:content.media:title: Emergency Shutdown on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A sudden equipment issue leads to an immediate shutdown during farm work. A quick look at troubleshooting, safety response, and protecting machinery from damage.

item.title: Behind the Scenes on the Farm
item.description: A behind-the-scenes look at daily farm operations. Exploring equipment use, field work, and the routines that keep a large-scale farming operation running smoothly.

media:content.media:title: Behind the Scenes on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A behind-the-scenes look at daily farm operations. Exploring equipment use, field work, and the routines that keep a large-scale farming operation running smoothly.

item.title: Upgrading a Combine with New Tracks
item.description: A look at installing new tracks on a combine. Covering the upgrade process, fitment, and how improved traction supports better performance in field conditions.

media:content.media:title: Upgrading a Combine with New Tracks
media:content.media:description: A look at installing new tracks on a combine. Covering the upgrade process, fitment, and how improved traction supports better performance in field conditions.

item.title: Would a Red One Last Longer?
item.description: A quick comparison and discussion about equipment durability and performance. Exploring whether a different model or setup could offer longer-lasting reliability in the field.

media:content.media:title: Would a Red One Last Longer?
media:content.media:description: A quick comparison and discussion about equipment durability and performance. Exploring whether a different model or setup could offer longer-lasting reliability in the field.

item.title: Painting a Farm Project Attempt
item.description: A hands-on attempt to paint a farm project. Focus on preparation, application, and finishing work while improving equipment or structures for practical use.

media:content.media:title: Painting a Farm Project Attempt
media:content.media:description: A hands-on attempt to paint a farm project. Focus on preparation, application, and finishing work while improving equipment or structures for practical use.

item.title: Dealing With Gopher Damage on the Farm
item.description: A look at how gopher activity affects farm fields. Focus on identifying damage, repair efforts, and managing pests to protect crops and soil.

media:content.media:title: Dealing With Gopher Damage on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at how gopher activity affects farm fields. Focus on identifying damage, repair efforts, and managing pests to protect crops and soil.

item.title: 9,000 Hours on Farm Equipment
item.description: A look at heavily used farm equipment reaching 9,000 hours of operation. Focus on durability, maintenance history, and continued performance in demanding field work.

media:content.media:title: 9,000 Hours on Farm Equipment
media:content.media:description: A look at heavily used farm equipment reaching 9,000 hours of operation. Focus on durability, maintenance history, and continued performance in demanding field work.

item.title: Two Weeks of Work Completed
item.description: A long project finally reaches completion after two weeks of effort. Focus on persistence, problem-solving, and finishing a demanding task from start to end.

media:content.media:title: Two Weeks of Work Completed
media:content.media:description: A long project finally reaches completion after two weeks of effort. Focus on persistence, problem-solving, and finishing a demanding task from start to end.
